chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4341 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 14.01.2025 Petitioner, Samira Mahamadi is present in person Article 199 of Constitution of Pakistan is available to an aggrieved person. The petitioner appearing in person has remained unable to befall herself within the said category, hence, the instant petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
